data.title: CACI Names Tom Kirkland Executive Vice President of Electronic Warfare
data.description: In Reston, Virginia, CACI International Inc (NYSE: CACI) revealed that Tom Kirkland has returned to the company as the Executive Vice President of Electronic Warfare. Taking the helm of CACI’s Electronic Warfare division, Kirkland will also join the executive leadership team. With extensive experience in defense technology, customer relations, and business management in various domains and mission-driven technology sectors, Kirkland's reappointment signifies a pivotal moment for CACI.

data.title: Bybit Livestream: Showcasing Blockchain for Good Alliance's Latest Incubation Cohort
data.description: In Dubai, the UAE, on July 2, 2026, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, is set to collaborate with the Blockchain for Good Alliance (BGA) in hosting an exclusive livestream event titled "Built for Good: The BGA Incubation Showcase." This event will take place on July 3, 2026, starting at 8:00 AM coordinated universal time (UTC). Be sure to tune in for insights and updates on advancements in the industry.

data.title: Coty Sharpens Leadership Structure and Operating Model Under Coty.Curated
data.description: Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY) (Paris: COTY) revealed organizational adjustments today to further its Coty.Curated strategy. Markus Strobel, Executive Chairman and interim CEO, will now oversee Prestige commercial operations directly. Regional leaders will report to Strobel. This alteration aims to streamline decision-making and enhance speed and efficiency within the company. The move signifies a shift towards market-focused leadership and accelerated decision-making processes.

data.title: Treasure Global Secures Canadian MSB Registration to Accelerate Oxi Wallet’s Global Fintech Expansion
data.description: Oxi Wallet bolsters its worldwide regulatory framework to facilitate its expansion across the Asia-Pacific region and other markets. The move aims to establish a solid foundation for growth and compliance, enhancing its presence globally.

data.title: Why OpenAI And Anthropic's Road To IPO Is Getting Bumpier
data.description: Anthropic's initial public offering (IPO) seems to be progressing smoothly following the resolution of a conflict with U.S. authorities. The journey towards an IPO for OpenAI and Anthropic is facing some challenges, as reported by Investor's Business Daily.
